controls.title: Obligations of manufacturers
controls.summary: Manufacturers must ensure products with digital elements are designed, developed, and produced with security by design, handling vulnerabilities throughout the lifecycle, providing a SBOM, and reporting exploited vulnerabilities.

controls.title: Reporting obligations of manufacturers
controls.summary: Manufacturers must report actively exploited vulnerabilities to ENISA within 24 hours (early warning) and a detailed notification within 72 hours. Voluntary reporting of other vulnerabilities is encouraged.

controls.title: Vulnerability handling requirements
controls.summary: Manufacturers must identify and document vulnerabilities in products, promptly deploy security updates, and maintain a coordinated vulnerability disclosure policy.

controls.title: SBOM — Software Bill of Materials
controls.summary: Manufacturers must draw up and maintain a SBOM covering at minimum the top-level dependencies, in a machine-readable format (SPDX or CycloneDX), and provide it upon request.
